title: Russian, Belarusian investors' opportunities to live in Latvia restricted
summary_full: On Thursday, the Saeima adopted amendments to the Immigration Law in its final reading, which would prevent citizens of Russia and Belarus from obtaining temporary residence permits through the investment program for alternative investment fund managers. LETA reports.
